system.description:
The anti-grav plates and studs of suspensors attach to a weapon or equipment, making it easier to use by offsetting some of the weight. Suspensors reduce the weight of a weapon by half, allowing Heavy weapons to be deployed in a wider range of situations.

When firing a weapon with suspensors, the operator counts as having the Auto-stabilised Trait—meaning he always counts as braced and may fire the weapon on semi- or full-automatic as a Half Action and never suffers penalties for moving and firing.

Upgrades: Any Heavy ranged weapon
